steps.t: Merrevail and mervyl perches as well as food sacks can be found at Shakam Moz in Rath Dúath. You should destroy perches and food sacks at Shakam Moz.
Perches and food sacks belonging to the winged folk can be found at Shakam Moz in Rath Dúath. You should destroy perches and food sacks at Shakam Moz.
